title: 7 DEADLY SINS
subtitle: of a CRYPTO TRADER
text-1: We all make mistakes while trading, and that’s perfectly fine
text-1-strong: as long as you don’t fall into the same mind traps again and again.
text-1-2: Stop giving into these trading sins and watch your trading improve overnight.
item-1-text: Closing the deal too early, missing the potential profit.
item-4-text: Trading against the trend, trying to outsmart the market.
item-6-text: Investing funds you cannot afford to lose.
item-7-text: Not using the analysis tools at your disposal.
text-bot: Now that you know what to avoid when trading crypto, you can approach your deals in a more professional and efficient manner.
